name: get-logs
description: Get logs from Railway for a deployment — covers deploy (runtime), build, and http (proxy request) contexts. Pass a specific deploymentId, or pass serviceId + environmentId to resolve the latest deployment. Use `types` to choose which streams to return (default: ['deploy']).

deploymentId.description: A specific deployment ID. If omitted, serviceId and environmentId must be provided to resolve the most recent deployment.

serviceId.description: Service ID (used together with environmentId when deploymentId is not given)

environmentId.description: Environment ID (used together with serviceId when deploymentId is not given)

types.description: Which log streams to fetch. Defaults to ['deploy']. Pass any combination of 'build', 'deploy', and 'http'.

limit.description: Max log entries per stream (default 100, max 500)

filter.description: Optional log filter expression (Loki-style, same syntax as the Railway dashboard). Applies to build and deploy streams.

startDate.description: ISO timestamp for the start of the log window

endDate.description: ISO timestamp for the end of the log window (defaults to now)
